description: House CRUD operations exist in firestore library
steps: Verify createHouse function is exported from packages/web/lib/firestore.ts
Verify getHouse function is exported from packages/web/lib/firestore.ts
Verify updateHouse function is exported from packages/web/lib/firestore.ts
Verify deleteHouse function is exported from packages/web/lib/firestore.ts
Verify listHouses function is exported with filter support
Verify uploadHouseCover function is exported from packages/web/lib/storage.ts
Verify uploadHouseFloorPlan function is exported from packages/web/lib/storage.ts

description: Firestore rules allow house collection access
steps: Verify firestore.rules contains a match rule for /houses/{houseId}
Verify houses collection allows public read
Verify houses collection restricts write to company members

description: Storage rules allow house image uploads
steps: Verify storage.rules contains a match rule for /houses/{companyId}/{houseId}/{allPaths=**}
Verify house storage allows public read and authenticated write with size/type limits
